requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — SII Mandatory SI Standards and Israel Electricity Authority Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——SII强制SI标准及以色列电力局要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——SII強制SI標準及以色列電力局要求

summary.en: The Standards Institution of Israel (SII) adopts IEC standards as mandatory SI standards for electrical equipment sold and installed in Israel. SII mandatory SI standards adopting IEC 61851 apply to EV supply equipment. IEC 61851-1 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-21-2 covers EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment. IEC 61851-23:2023 addresses DC EV charging stations. The Israel Electricity Authority and Israel Electric Corporation require SII-compliant equipment for grid-connected EV charging installations. SII certification or a declaration of conformity to the applicable SI/IEC standard may be required by the site owner, installer, or project specification.
summary.zh: 以色列标准协会（SII）将IEC标准采纳为在以色列销售和安装的电气设备的强制SI标准。采纳IEC 61851的SII强制SI标准适用于电动汽车供电设备。IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-21-2涵盖非车载EVSE的EMC要求。IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流电动汽车充电站。以色列电力局和以色列电力公司要求并网电动汽车充电安装采用符合SII的设备。场地方、安装方或项目规范可能要求提供SII认证或适用SI/IEC标准的合规声明。
summary.zht: 以色列標準協會（SII）將IEC標準採納為在以色列銷售和安裝的電氣設備的強制SI標準。採納IEC 61851的SII強制SI標準適用於電動汽車供電設備。IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-21-2涵蓋非車載EVSE的EMC要求。IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流電動汽車充電站。以色列電力局和以色列電力公司要求併網電動汽車充電安裝採用符合SII的設備。場地方、安裝方或項目規範可能要求提供SII認證或適用SI/IEC標準的合規聲明。

standards_or_laws: SI/IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (SII mandatory adoption)
IEC 61851-21-2 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-2: EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
SII (Standards Institution of Israel) mandatory SI standards for electrical equipment
Israel Electricity Authority electrical installation regulations

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports accepted by SII, the Israel Electricity Authority, or the project owner for Israel installations.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代SII、以色列电力局或项目业主针对以色列安装所认可的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代SII、以色列電力局或項目業主針對以色列安裝所認可的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence for off-board EVSE, IP-rated enclosure test certificates, protective device ratings, and installation instructions aligned with SII and Israel Electricity Authority requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence for Israel without a clause-level gap assessment and supplementary IEC-accredited testing.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、非车载EVSE的IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据、IP防护等级认证书、保护器件额定值，以及符合SII和以色列电力局要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估和补充IEC认可测试的情况下，不被视为以色列IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、非車載EVSE的IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據、IP防護等級認證書、保護器件額定值，以及符合SII和以色列電力局要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估和補充IEC認可測試的情況下，不被視為以色列IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SII adopts IEC 61851 as mandatory SI standards for EV supply equipment in Israel; Israel Electricity Authority and Israel Electric Corporation require compliant equipment for grid-connected installations; confirm exact SI standard edition and SII certification requirements for the specific product type
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Israel without additional accredited testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Israel-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, and IP-rated enclosure certificates meeting SII and Israel Electricity Authority requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向以色列的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据，以及满足SII和以色列电力局要求的IP防护等级认证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向以色列的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據，以及滿足SII和以色列電力局要求的IP防護等級認證書。
